title: "Gibbs Prior Average" format: html editor: visual ---

# Setup

```{r}
setwd("/Users/brandonmarks/Desktop/Research/Palacios Lab/Untitled/Enertree/Brandon/gibbs_prior")

library(ape)
library(phylodyn)
library(phangorn)
library(phyclust)
library(phylotools)
library(fmatrix)
library(coda)
library(ggplot2)

source("utils.R")

output_root <- file.path("plots", "average")
dir.create(output_root, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
source("gibbs_prior_joint_standardized_helpers.R")
```

## Shared Data

```{r}
n_tips <- 25
set.seed(123)

sequences <- as.phyDat(read.FASTA("sequences.fasta"))

M_true_tree <- read.tree("true_tree.newick")
inter_coal_times <- coalescent.intervals(M_true_tree)$interval.length
inter_coal_times[which(inter_coal_times <= 0.000001)] <- 0.0000001
true_coalescent_times <- cumsum(inter_coal_times)
M_true_fmat <- gen_Fmat(M_true_tree, tol = 8)
```

### Reference Matrices

```{r}
dm <- dist.hamming(sequences)

upgma_tree <- upgma(dm)
upgma_tree <- update_time(upgma_tree, true_coalescent_times)
M_upgma_fmat <- gen_Fmat(upgma_tree, tol = 8)

start_tree <- nj(dm)
start_tree <- midpoint(start_tree)
start_tree <- multi2di(start_tree, random = FALSE)

fit <- pml(start_tree, data = sequences)
fit <- optim.pml(fit, model = "JC", rearrangement = "stochastic", optClock = TRUE)

mle_tree <- fit$tree
mle_tree <- midpoint(mle_tree)
mle_tree <- multi2di(mle_tree, random = FALSE)
mle_tree <- update_time(mle_tree, true_coalescent_times)
mle_tree$edge.length[mle_tree$edge.length < 1e-8] <- 1e-8
M_mle_fmat <- gen_Fmat(mle_tree, tol = 8)
```

### BEAST Reference Data

```{r}
trees_beast_compare <- read.nexus("HKY1000Gibbs-sequences.trees")
beast_compare_fmats <- lapply(trees_beast_compare, gen_Fmat, tol = 8)
```

# Experiments

## UPGMA Max

```{r}
upgma_max_result <- run_mean_mh_experiment(
  experiment_id = "upgma_max",
  init_M = M_upgma_fmat,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  update_time = 1000,
  n_iter = 10000,
  beta = 0.1,
  sample_beta = TRUE,
  lambda = 1,
  mode = "max",
  take_every = 1,
  include_log_Z = FALSE
)

upgma_max_summary <- render_mh_experiment(
  result = upgma_max_result,
  experiment_id = "upgma_max",
  comparison_matrices = list(M_true_fmat, nearby_Fmat(upgma_max_result$average_M)),
  comparison_labels = c("True M", "Average M"),
  beast_compare_fmats = beast_compare_fmats,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  sub_samp = 1000,
  seed = 44
)
```

## True Init

```{r}
true_init_result <- run_mean_mh_experiment(
  experiment_id = "true_init",
  init_M = M_true_fmat,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  update_time = 1000,
  n_iter = 10000,
  beta = 0.1,
  sample_beta = TRUE,
  lambda = 1,
  mode = "max",
  take_every = 1,
  include_log_Z = FALSE
)

true_init_summary <- render_mh_experiment(
  result = true_init_result,
  experiment_id = "true_init",
  comparison_matrices = list(M_true_fmat, nearby_Fmat(true_init_result$average_M)),
  comparison_labels = c("True M", "Average M"),
  beast_compare_fmats = beast_compare_fmats,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  sub_samp = 1000,
  seed = 45
)
```

## MLE Init

```{r}
mle_init_result <- run_mean_mh_experiment(
  experiment_id = "mle_init",
  init_M = M_mle_fmat,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  update_time = 1000,
  n_iter = 10000,
  beta = 0.1,
  sample_beta = TRUE,
  lambda = 1,
  mode = "max",
  take_every = 1,
  include_log_Z = FALSE
)

mle_init_summary <- render_mh_experiment(
  result = mle_init_result,
  experiment_id = "mle_init",
  comparison_matrices = list(M_true_fmat, nearby_Fmat(mle_init_result$average_M)),
  comparison_labels = c("True M", "Average M"),
  beast_compare_fmats = beast_compare_fmats,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  sub_samp = 1000,
  seed = 46
)
```

## BEAST

```{r}
trees_beast_ess <- read.nexus("100THOUSANDTREES-sequences.trees")
beast_ess_fmats <- lapply(trees_beast_ess, gen_Fmat, tol = 8)

beast_summary <- render_beast_experiment(
  beast_fmats = beast_compare_fmats,
  experiment_id = "beast",
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  sub_samp = 1000,
  seed = 47
)

matrix_chain_ess_heatmap(
  beast_ess_fmats,
  title = "beast: BEAST Unsampled ESS",
  save_path = save_path_for("beast", "unsampled_ess.png")
)

matrix_chain_ess_heatmap(
  beast_ess_fmats,
  normalize = TRUE,
  per_n_samples = 1000,
  title = "beast: BEAST Unsampled ESS per 1000 samples",
  save_path = save_path_for("beast", "unsampled_ess_per_1000.png")
)
```

## Temperature Experiment

```{r}
upgma_temp_max_result <- run_mean_mh_experiment(
  experiment_id = "upgma_temp_max",
  init_M = M_upgma_fmat,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  update_time = 1000,
  n_iter = 10000,
  beta = 0.1,
  sample_beta = TRUE,
  lambda = 100,
  mode = "max",
  take_every = 1,
  include_log_Z = FALSE
)

upgma_temp_max_summary <- render_mh_experiment(
  result = upgma_temp_max_result,
  experiment_id = "upgma_temp_max",
  comparison_matrices = list(M_true_fmat, nearby_Fmat(upgma_temp_max_result$average_M)),
  comparison_labels = c("True M", "Average M"),
  beast_compare_fmats = beast_compare_fmats,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  sub_samp = 1000,
  seed = 44
)
```

```{r}
upgma_temp1000_max_result <- run_mean_mh_experiment(
  experiment_id = "upgma_temp1000_max",
  init_M = M_upgma_fmat,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  update_time = 1000,
  n_iter = 10000,
  beta = 0.1,
  sample_beta = TRUE,
  lambda = 1000,
  mode = "max",
  take_every = 1,
  include_log_Z = FALSE
)

upgma_temp1000_max_summary <- render_mh_experiment(
  result = upgma_temp1000_max_result,
  experiment_id = "upgma_temp1000_max",
  comparison_matrices = list(M_true_fmat, nearby_Fmat(upgma_temp1000_max_result$average_M)),
  comparison_labels = c("True M", "Average M"),
  beast_compare_fmats = beast_compare_fmats,
  coal_times = true_coalescent_times,
  sequences = sequences,
  sub_samp = 1000,
  seed = 44
)
```

## Summary

```{r}
experiment_summary <- rbind(
  upgma_max_summary,
  true_init_summary,
  mle_init_summary,
  upgma_temp_max_summary,
  upgma_temp1000_max_summary,
  beast_summary
)

print(experiment_summary)

write.csv(
  experiment_summary,
  file = file.path(output_root, "experiment_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

saveRDS(
  experiment_summary,
  file = file.path(output_root, "experiment_summary.rds")
)
```
